name: Claude Code
automation_gates: Back up managed settings before edits.
Verify managed shell and hook config.
Rollback restores the previous settings backup without touching unrelated config.
Off mode removes only Switchboard-owned blocks.
manual_workflow: Install Claude Code.
Enable Claude Code routing from Switchboard.
Use Doctor repair if managed config drifts.

name: Codex
automation_gates: Back up provider config before edits.
Verify Codex provider block and proxy URL in Doctor.
Rollback restores the previous provider config backup.
Codex SQLite retagging requires explicit opt-in.
Off mode removes only managed provider blocks.
manual_workflow: Install Codex.
Enable Codex routing from Switchboard.
Review retagging backup/restore notes before opting in.

name: Gemini CLI
automation_gates: Back up shell/profile targets before managed edits.
Write only Switchboard-owned shell blocks.
Verify Gemini base-url exports.
Rollback removes managed blocks or restores backup evidence.
Off mode removes local proxy routing without account changes.
manual_workflow: Confirm Gemini CLI is installed.
Toggle the connector on from Settings.
Use Doctor repair if managed routing drifts.

name: OpenCode
automation_gates: Back up provider settings before edits.
Verify managed provider baseURL.
Rollback restores provider settings from backup.
Off mode removes only Switchboard-owned provider entries.
manual_workflow: Confirm OpenCode is installed.
Toggle the connector on from Settings.
Use Doctor repair if provider config drifts.

name: Cursor
automation_gates: Detect the active Cursor user profile and settings surface before proposing provider changes.
Show a dry-run diff and keep account-specific model choices visible before routing.
Back up Cursor settings without reading extension-managed secrets or global state databases.
Require exact user consent before any native/provider write is enabled.
Verify Cursor routing through Doctor evidence after a managed write.
Rollback restores the exact profile backup without touching unrelated editor or extension config.
Off mode removes only Switchboard-owned Cursor routing markers.
manual_workflow: Open Cursor settings.
Review provider and model settings manually.
Use Repo Intelligence packs as copyable context.

name: Grok / xAI CLI
automation_gates: Detect the documented Grok Build config.toml surface before applying routing.
Write only [endpoints].models_base_url to the Switchboard loopback proxy; preserve all provider, model, and account fields.
Create a sibling backup and verify the managed endpoint marker before advertising native routing.
Rollback restores the exact config backup and Off mode removes only the Switchboard-owned endpoint block.
Keep XAI_API_KEY, auth.json, account state, and model selection outside managed app storage.
manual_workflow: Confirm the installed grok binary and review the native config preview.
Keep XAI_API_KEY or Grok login authentication configured manually.
Run a Grok prompt and verify activity appears in Headroom.

name: Aider
automation_gates: Detect provider configuration without exposing secrets.
Back up the Switchboard-owned sidecar before managed edits.
Write only the Switchboard-owned Aider routing-intent sidecar.
Verify Aider sidecar routing in Doctor without reading provider secrets.
Rollback removes only the Switchboard-owned Aider sidecar marker.
Off mode removes managed routing without touching provider config.
manual_workflow: Confirm Aider is installed.
Toggle the connector on from Settings to create the managed sidecar.
Keep provider config manual until a documented provider file adapter is proven.

name: Continue
automation_gates: Detect active Continue config without reading secrets.
Back up the Switchboard-owned sidecar before managed edits.
Write only the Switchboard-owned Continue routing-intent sidecar.
Verify Continue sidecar routing in Doctor without reading provider secrets.
Rollback removes only the Switchboard-owned Continue sidecar marker.
Off mode removes managed routing without touching provider config.
manual_workflow: Confirm Continue config storage is available.
Toggle the connector on from Settings to create the managed sidecar.
Keep provider setup manual until a documented provider file adapter is proven.

name: Goose
automation_gates: Detect Goose and install only the app-managed Repo Memory MCP bridge; native provider routing stays manual and unmodified.
Back up and verify the managed MCP descriptor before Goose handoff.
Rollback and Off mode clean up only Switchboard-owned MCP bridge metadata, never Goose provider credentials.
manual_workflow: Prepare Repo Memory MCP from Mode Inspector for Goose context handoff.
Keep Goose provider and model routing manual.
Use Doctor to verify, repair, rollback, or clean up only the managed MCP bridge.

name: Qwen Code
automation_gates: Detect provider/model settings read-only.
Back up the Switchboard-owned sidecar before edits.
Verify Qwen sidecar routing in Doctor without reading account secrets.
Rollback removes only the Switchboard-owned Qwen sidecar marker.
Off mode removes managed routing without touching account state.
manual_workflow: Confirm local CLI availability.
Use copied packs/session handoffs.
Keep account and model setup manual.

name: Amazon Q Developer CLI
automation_gates: Do not read AWS credentials, profiles, or SSO cache.
Back up the Switchboard-owned sidecar before managed edits.
Write only the Switchboard-owned sidecar marker inside Amazon Q config storage.
Verify Amazon Q sidecar routing in Doctor without reading account secrets.
Rollback removes only the Switchboard-owned Amazon Q sidecar marker.
Off mode removes managed routing without touching AWS account state.
manual_workflow: Confirm Amazon Q Developer CLI is installed.
Toggle the connector on from Settings to create the managed sidecar.
Keep AWS auth, provider, and workspace selection manual.

name: Windsurf
automation_gates: Back up Windsurf settings.json before edits.
Verify managed anthropic.baseUrl routing.
Rollback restores settings.json from backup.
Off mode removes only Switchboard-owned managed markers.
manual_workflow: Confirm Windsurf is installed.
Toggle the connector on from Settings.
Use Doctor repair if provider config drifts.

name: Zed AI
automation_gates: Detect Zed settings.json before injecting routing block.
Preserve unknown settings losslessly.
Restore settings from backup.
Verify managed provider routing after apply.
Off mode removes the managed routing block on disconnect.
manual_workflow: Restart Zed to pick up the injected routing block.
Verify a prompt routes through Headroom.
